productDisplayName: Puma Men Standpunkt Brown Casual Shoes
description: A perfect casual for the stylish, the puma Standpunkt Classis comes in a suede and leather combination that makes it a fab addition to your wradrobe. Team it with jeans and t-shirts for unparalleled cool. Upper Leather upper with suede overlays for durability and style Stitch detailing in puma formstripe style for durability and style Mildly padded tongue and collar Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Ergonomically curved footbed for comfort Midsole EVA midsole for greater shock absorption Outsole Non-slip rubber outsole with a hexagonal pivot point on the big toe mound for easy 180 degree movement Multi-directional grooves throughout the outsole for absolute grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner if needed Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
